failure_modes.cause: Thermal degradation or salt precipitation of TBAB/EG at 120°C over 6.7 min residence time
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement inline filtration and periodic solvent flush cycles

failure_modes.cause: High coefficient of thermal expansion of EG in a closed system between pump and BPR
failure_modes.mitigation: Install a pressure relief valve (PRV) set to 1.2x BPR setting

failure_modes.cause: PFA tubing operating near its continuous service temperature limit under constant pressure at 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Use PFA tubing with stainless steel outer braiding or reinforced cladding

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — crystallization of DES in the orifice leads to catastrophic pressure spike
validation_experiments: Long-term stability run: Operate system at 120°C with TBAB/EG for 24 hours; monitor dP for increase > 10%
Thermal stress test: Cycle temperature from 20°C to 120°C at flow to verify BPR stability and tubing integrity
Solubility limit check: Analyze post-reaction stream for precipitate formation upon cooling to quench temperature
